scripts.test:package: pnpm run build && node --input-type=module -e "const pkg = await import('@meta-harness/fixtures'); if (!Array.isArray(pkg.fixtureDefinitions)) throw new Error('fixtureDefinitions export missing'); if (pkg.fixtureDefinitions.length !== 2) throw new Error('fixtureDefinitions length mismatch'); if (pkg.fixtureDefinitions[0]?.id !== 'repo-scan-basic' || pkg.fixtureDefinitions[1]?.id !== 'verify-node-build') throw new Error('fixtureDefinitions ids mismatch');"
